title: EXCELJS Protect
author: gjansen5334
body:
## 💬 Questions and Help

Has anyone ever got the protect to work when trying to protect spreadsheet. I an running EXCELJS on an IBM Iseries box. It creates the spreadsheet just fine but I can not get the protect to work

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @gjansen5334 You can refer to #[this issue](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2275), by the way, what software did you use to open the excel, and can you provide your excel file? and post your code?
